description:
Let administrators define custom roles with granular permissions for viewing, creating, editing, and deleting resources per workspace or board.

**Rationale:** Enterprise teams require strict data governance. RBAC unlocks adoption by organizations with security compliance needs.
title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
